data.title: This Week in Crypto Asia: Thailand Will Block Access To Bybit, OKX, CoinEx
data.description:
Thailand’s Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is set to block access to Bybit, OKX, CoinEx, 1000X, and XT. COM starting 28 June 2025. According to a 30 May 2025 Thai SEC press release, the decision to block five major exchanges is based on allegations that they have been providing services in Thailand without the necessary license.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/this-week-in-crypto-asia-thailand-will-block-access-to-bybit-okx-coinex/

data.title: Planet Evening News
Binance: Eligible users can claim 133 ASRR tokens airdrop on the Alpha event page
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance announced that Assisterr AI (ASRR) trading will start at 21:00 (UTC+8) on May 30, 2025.
Eligible Binance users with at least 207 Binance Alpha points can claim an airdrop of 133 ASRR tokens on the Alpha event page starting at 21:00 (UTC+8) on May 30, 2025.
Please note that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha points. Users need to complete the claim within 24 hours after the claim is opened, otherwise it will be deemed to have given up the airdrop.

data.title: New Fire Technology announced that it has completed the acquisition of BitTrade (formerly Huobi Japan)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Xinhuo Technology Holdings Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "Xinhuo Technology", stock code: 1611.HK) issued a "Very Substantial Acquisition and Related Transactions" announcement, stating that it had completed the acquisition of the British Virgin Islands Company on April 15, 2025, and the acquisition of BitTrade Sales Shares was completed on May 29, 2025.
After the completion of the acquisition, the British Virgin Islands Company has become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Xinhuo Technology, and BitTrade has become an indirect subsidiary of Xinhuo Technology. The financial results of the British Virgin Islands Company and BitTrade will be incorporated into the financial statements of Xinhuo Technology. It is reported that Xinhuo Technology has issued consideration shares to the sellers of the British Virgin Islands Company and the sellers of BitTrade in accordance with the terms of the agreements.

data.title: Liang Xi: James Wynn has multiple hedge positions, aiming to manipulate speculators’ emotions, and has shorted HYPE at $39
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto KOL Liang Xi (@liangxihuigui) replied to the whale James Wynn on the X platform: "James Wynn is a fake person created by HYPE. He hedges his positions with multiple accounts, one account is long and the other accounts are short, so that he will not bear any actual losses. His goal is to manipulate the emotions of over-leveraged speculators, lure retail investors into the trap, and increase the popularity of HYPE to induce people to buy. I have shorted HYPE when it reached a high of $39, and I believe the price of HYPE will fall below $20." OKX market shows that the current HYPE price is $32.7.

data.title: Sui Validators Approve Return of Frozen Assets Following Cetus Exploit
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Sui validators have approved a governance proposal to return $162 million in frozen assets linked to a recent exploit of the decentralized exchange Cetus. This decision marks a significant step toward full user repayment after the exchange was exploited for over $220 million worth of digital assets on May 22. Shortly after the incident, validators managed to freeze $162 million of the funds, preventing further losses. The governance vote, concluded on May 29, saw 90.9% of validators voting in favor of the recovery proposal, with 1.5% abstaining and 7.2% not participating, as reported on the network’s official governance page.

The approved proposal will see the impacted funds moved to a multi-signature wallet, where they will be held in trust until they can be returned to users according to a plan led by Cetus. This decision follows a debate within the crypto community regarding the role of validators in freezing on-chain funds. While some decentralization advocates criticized the ability of validators to freeze funds, others praised the swift response as a positive step in combating growing crypto industry exploits. The community vote is part of a broader recovery plan that includes utilizing Cetus’ treasury and an emergency loan from the Sui Foundation.

Cetus has expressed gratitude for the rapid community support and shared its recovery roadmap following the vote. Initially, Sui validators will implement the upgrade to transfer the frozen funds to Cetus’ multisignature wallet. Subsequently, Cetus will initiate the upgrade for its emergency recovery pool and complete full data restoration. The protocol aims to achieve full recovery and restart within approximately one week. A dedicated compensation contract is currently under development and will undergo auditor review before deployment. Once the full protocol restart is completed, all liquidity providers in the affected pools will regain access to their recovered liquidity. Remaining losses will be claimable through the compensation contract, ensuring that affected users are compensated for their losses.

data.title: Bitcoin's MVRV Ratio Indicates Potential Market Overheating
data.description:
According to Foresight News, analysis by Glassnode reveals that Bitcoin's (BTC) current Market Value to Realized Value (MVRV) ratio stands at 2.4. This places it between the +0.5σ ($100,200) and +1σ ($119,400) bands, suggesting the market is nearing an overheated state but still has room for growth.

Analysts highlight that while this range typically signals the formation of a local top, Bitcoin has yet to breach the critical +1σ MVRV range, a level historically associated with significant profit-taking. They note that continuous inflows from ETFs and accumulation by institutional investors are supporting Bitcoin's price. Despite the emergence of retail FOMO (fear of missing out), large-scale profit-taking has not yet occurred.

Experts advise closely monitoring the +1σ MVRV range, as this level has traditionally triggered investor behavior characterized by the sentiment of "too good to sell."

data.title: James Wynn: I don’t regret opening a large position with high multiple contracts, and will focus on building a community around moonpig
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: James Wynn, a giant whale, posted on the X platform: "It's very interesting to be a contract gambler, and I don't regret it at all. It's really exciting to turn $4 million into $100 million and then fall back to $13 million. Most people don't dare or dare to do this kind of transaction. They can't do it, don't have the money to do it, and don't have the courage to take this risk publicly. Maybe next time I will try to make $1 billion, and I will come back. For now, I will invest my time to help build a community around moonpig." 
Previously reported, the giant whale James Wynn closed a 40x leveraged BTC long position, with a single loss of $37.42 million, and switched to a 10x leveraged long PEPE, with an overall account loss of $14.03 million.
